title: Jannes Modpack
description: The best mods. Performance and helpful GUI mods.
body:
This modpack contains all the mods and resource packs that Flammenherzzz uses (and a few others that I personally find very useful quality-of-life mods)! This modpack works perfectly fine in single-player mode. If you want to use it on a server, make sure it allows mods like Litematica, Freecam, or Clientsort. I am not responsible for any bans resulting from the use of these mods.

Important:
Newer mod versions must be updated manually.



Quelle: https://vanillatweaks.net
